analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒緊繃，受中國DeepSeek事件影響，美股大幅下挫，納斯達克指數領跌。AI基礎設施製造商大幅下跌，Nvidia下跌16%。紐約金屬交易所黃金、白銀價格下跌，黃金跌幅達1.4%，連續兩天下跌，白銀跌幅達2.5%，連續三天下跌。美國和墨西哥聯合開設一座無菌蠅廠，以應對蠅蛆疫情的爆發。英國政府將投入5億英鎊於研發高科技突擊工具，包括高速艇和無人機，以提升突擊部隊的戰鬥能力和效率。

【結語】
投資者們應該保持冷靜，避免被市場情緒左右。今天的市場下跌可能是短期的調整，但長期來看，市場仍然有許多機會。投資者們應該保持耐心，持續觀察市場情況，並根據自己的投資策略進行操作。另外，投資者們應該注意風險管理，避免過度投資於任何一支股票或市場。

【精選個股】
VTIX - Virtuix Inc. - Virtuix Inc. 進入 Meta 的「為 Meta 設計」的計畫，並在 Meta Store 上推出捆綁包，內含優化的 Omni 遊戲。
INVE - Identiv, Inc. - Identiv, Inc. 與 Trackonomy Systems, Inc. 有關的合併交易將會帶來新的發展機會。
SITE - SiteOne Landscape Supply, Inc. - SiteOne Landscape Supply, Inc. 進行分析師/投資者日，展示公司最新財務與發展情況。

風險提醒：投資者們應該注意風險管理，避免過度投資於任何一支股票或市場。

items.title: Intel's AI Bet Is Finally Paying Off -- Is It Time to Reconsider This Stock?
items.summary: Intel's comeback story is getting real. See what's driving the rally, what Foundry still must prove, and whether this AI bet makes the stock worth a second look.
items.zh_title: 英特爾的AI賭注終於開始賺錢了—is 時間到了重新評估這個股票？
items.zh_point: 英特爾的反轉故事正獲得重視。了解推動股價上升的原因、晶圓代工的未來發展和這個AI賭注是否值得重新評估。

items.title: Wall Street Thinks AI Capex Is Unsustainable -- Here's Why Big Tech Keeps Spending Anyway
items.summary: Is AI fatigue setting in?
items.zh_title: 華爾街認為人工智慧投資是不持續的——這是為什麼大科技公司仍繼續花錢的
items.zh_point: 人工智慧疲勞的跡象出現了嗎？華爾街的分析師認為人工智慧投資是不持續的，但大科技公司仍繼續花錢在人工智慧領域。

items.title: This Little-Known Biotech Just Delivered a Bigger IPO Pop Than SpaceX -- and Regeneron Is Already Invested
items.summary: Parabilis Medicines is ambitious, but it has Regeneron on its side already.
items.zh_title: 這個不為人知的生物科技公司 IPO 爆發比SpaceX更大，Regeneron已經投資
items.zh_point: Parabilis Medicines是一家雄心勃勃的生物科技公司，已經獲得了Regeneron的投資支持。

items.title: Is Virtuix (VTIX) Using Meta’s Quest Tie-In to Redefine Its XR Platform Ambitions?
items.summary: In June 2026, Virtuix Inc. launched Omni One for Quest, integrating its omni-directional treadmill with Meta Quest 2 and Quest 3 headsets under Meta’s “Made for Meta” program and featuring the system in the Meta Store with bundled, Omni-optimized games. This move not only connects Virtuix to millions of active Quest users but also deepens its position in full-body XR interaction, creating broader opportunities for recurring content partnerships and defense-oriented training...
items.zh_title: Virtuix (VTIX) 是否利用 Meta Quest 的聯盟重塑其 XR 平台願景？
items.zh_point: Virtuix Inc. 在 2026 年 6 月推出 Omni One for Quest，將其全向跑步機與 Meta Quest 2 和 Quest 3 頭戴裝置整合，進入 Meta 的「為 Meta 設計」的計畫，並在 Meta Store 上推出捆綁包，內含優化的 Omni 遊戲。這項行動不僅將 Virtuix 連接到數百萬活躍的 Quest 用戶，也進一步深化其在全身 XR 互動的位置，開闢更廣闊的機會，包括重複內容夥伴關係和防禦性訓練等。

items.title: Should You Buy Bitcoin While It's Under $70,000? The Answer Might Surprise You.
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market is running out of upside catalysts, and investors are heading for the exits.
items.zh_title: 你應該在 70,000 美元以下買入比特幣嗎？答案可能讓你意想不到。
items.zh_point: 比特幣市場缺乏上升動力，投資者正在離場。

items.title: U.S. military attacks Iranian targets after commercial tanker hit in the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The attacks come as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-day ceasefire as they attempt to work toward a resolution.
items.zh_title: 美國軍方攻擊伊朗目標　商船在霍爾木茲海峽遭擊沉
items.zh_point: 美國和伊朗正在嘗試達成解決方案時，兩國之間出現了衝突，美國軍方對伊朗目標進行了攻擊。

items.title: Death toll in Venezuela quake tops 1,400 as rescue efforts intensify
items.summary: Venezuela's interim President Delcy Rodriguez said on state television that 10 more countries were still to join rescue efforts.
items.zh_title: 委內瑞拉地震死亡人數超過 1,400 名人士 救援工作加速
items.zh_point: 委內瑞拉地震造成至少 1,400 人死亡，緊急救援工作正加速進行，委內瑞拉臨時總統德爾西·羅德里格斯（Delcy Rodriguez）表示，還有 10 個國家準備加入救援工作。

items.title: Trump says he is nominating former Oklahoma state trooper Lance Schroyer as ICE director
items.summary: The nomination comes after former ICE director Todd Lyons resigned at the end of May. David Venturella has been serving as the acting head of the agency.
items.zh_title: 川普宣布提名前奧克拉荷馬州警員拉恩斯·史洛伊爾為移民局局長
items.zh_point: 川普總統宣布提名前奧克拉荷馬州警員拉恩斯·史洛伊爾（Lance Schroyer）為移民及海關執法局（ICE）局長，接替前局長托德·李昂斯（Todd Lyons）離職後出任臨時局長的戴維德·文特拉拉（David Venturella）。

items.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
items.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
items.zh_title: SpaceX加入納斯達克100指數將加速ETF買賣需求
items.zh_point: SpaceX將快速加入納斯達克100指數，成為首批受益者之一，納斯達克最近採用了快速加入框架。這將會引發大量ETF買賣需求。

items.title: Amazon Prime Day offers a glimpse into the U.S. consumer as shoppers navigate with pinched wallets
items.summary: Retail experts attribute the 9.3% year-over-year increase in spending to high inflation and shoppers purchasing more discretionary, long-lasting products.
items.zh_title: 亞馬遜 Prime Day 提供了美國消費者購物習慣的線索
items.zh_point: 亞馬遜 Prime Day 的消費者支出增加了 9.3%，專家認為這是由於高通膨和消費者購買更多長期使用的非必需品所致。

items.title: How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed
items.summary: Claiming benefits before full retirement age while keeping a job can trigger unexpected withholdings — but the money isn’t lost forever.
items.zh_title: 如何在退休時工作而不影響退休金
items.zh_point: 在退休前全額領取退休金同時工作，可能會導致意外扣除，但這些錢不是永久喪失的。

items.title: Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.
items.summary: It was a very good year for most workplace retirement savers, according to Vanguard’s latest “How America Saves” report.
items.zh_title: 美國員工退休基金餘額創下新高
items.zh_point: 根據Vanguard最新的「美國如何儲蓄」報告顯示，多數員工退休基金儲蓄餘額在去年有顯著增長。

items.title: Social Security says I was overpaid for 7 years. I believe it’s mistaken. Can they cut my benefits?
items.summary: “They say I made $43,000 in 2019, but I actually made that in 2020.”
items.zh_title: 社保局說我7年前多領了錢，我堅信是錯誤的。能否削減我的福利？
items.zh_point: 社保局錯誤地計算我2019年的收入，錯誤地認為我在那年有$43,000的收入，實際上我是在2020年收入這筆錢。

items.title: This disease is more expensive than cancer and heart disease combined. And it’s only going to get worse.
items.summary: “People should be alarmed. This is a health crisis. It’s also an economic crisis for families and government.”
items.zh_title: 這種疾病比癌症和心臟病加起來還要昂貴。並且還會惡化。
items.zh_point: 這種疾病已經對家庭和政府造成了嚴重的經濟負擔，同時也是一個健康危機。

items.title: Older Americans will soon have Medicare access to GLP-1s for weight loss for the first time. Here’s what they need to know.
items.summary: Starting July 1, Medicare beneficiaries who qualify can get weight-loss drugs for $50 a month. They should consider the side effects and muscle loss.
items.zh_title: 美國老年人將首次獲得Medicare覆蓋的GLP-1減重藥物
items.zh_point: 從7月1日起，符合條件的Medicare受益人可以每月花費50美元購買減重藥物，但需要考慮藥物副作用和肌肉損失。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美股大幅下挫 受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美股大幅下挫，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商大幅下跌，Nvidia下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所黃金、白銀下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所黃金和白銀價格下跌，黃金跌幅達1.4%，連續兩天下跌，白銀跌幅達2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，並不需要使用最先進的芯片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊業匯報：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊業公司在最新的市場話題中獲得關注。

items.title: Broadstone Net Lease: An Investment-Grade Winner Among Diversified REITs, As Margins Recover
items.zh_title: 布羅斯通網絡租賃：投資級勝利者中最具多樣化REIT
items.zh_point: 布羅斯通網絡租賃的盈利能力正在恢復，該公司已成為投資級REIT中的一個勝利者。

items.title: Financial Institutions Boost Dividends In June As 16 Companies Ready To Increase Payouts In July
items.zh_title: 金融機構在六月份增加股息，七月份16家公司準備增加分紅
items.zh_point: 多家金融機構在六月份宣布增加股息，同時有16家公司準備在七月份進行分紅調整，表明股息政策正朝著增加的方向發展。

items.title: No quick fix to lowering gas prices despite Trump's protests, Chevron exec says
items.zh_title: 儘管川普抗議 油價下降的快速解決方案並不存在
items.zh_point: 一名雪士伯高層表示，儘管川普總統的抗議，油價下降的快速解決方案並不存在。

items.title: Identiv, Inc. (INVE) Trackonomy Systems, Inc. - M&A Call - Slideshow
items.zh_title: Identiv, Inc. (INVE) Trackonomy Systems, Inc. - M&A Call - Slideshow
items.zh_point: Identiv, Inc. (INVE) 與 Trackonomy Systems, Inc. 有關的合併交易會議簡報。

items.title: SiteOne Landscape Supply, Inc. (SITE) Analyst/Investor Day - Slideshow
items.zh_title: SiteOne Landscape Supply, Inc. (SITE) 分析師/投資者日 - 幻燈片
items.zh_point: SiteOne Landscape Supply, Inc. 進行分析師/投資者日，展示公司最新財務與發展情況。

items.title: Australia toughens kids’ social media ban, doubles potential penalties for tech firms
items.zh_title: 澳洲加強兒童社交媒體禁令，對科技公司罰款倍增
items.zh_point: 澳洲政府決定加強對兒童社交媒體的監管，嚴格限制兒童在社交媒體上的使用，同時對違規的科技公司罰款倍增，以防止兒童在社交媒體上受到不當影響。

items.title: U.S., Mexico open sterile fly facility to combat screwworm outbreak
items.zh_title: 美國、墨西哥開設無菌蠅廠以應對蠅蛆疫情
items.zh_point: 美國和墨西哥聯合開設一座無菌蠅廠，以應對蠅蛆疫情的爆發，該疫情對農業產業造成了嚴重的影響。

items.title: UK to commit £500 million to high-speed boats and drones for Commando Force
items.zh_title: 英國將投入5億英鎊於高速艇和無人機為突擊部隊
items.zh_point: 英國政府將投入5億英鎊於研發高科技突擊工具，包括高速艇和無人機，以提升突擊部隊的戰鬥能力和效率。

items.title: US carries out fresh strikes against Iran after tanker struck in Hormuz, escalating hostilities
items.zh_title: 美國對伊朗進行新一輪轟炸反應，伊朗油輪在霍爾木茲海峽受襲升級局勢
items.zh_point: 美國對伊朗進行新一輪轟炸反應，伊朗油輪在霍爾木茲海峽受襲升級局勢，美伊關係進一步惡化。

items.title: U.S. carries out fresh strikes on Iran after another ship is attacked
items.zh_title: 美國對伊朗進行新的軍事打擊行動
items.zh_point: 美國對伊朗進行新的軍事打擊行動，原因是伊朗再次攻擊一艘船隻。
